titleStmt.title: SII 27.424: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 424. (A.R. No. 558 of 1929-30.) HATTIYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in prākāra of the Lōkanāthēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1499, Īśvara, Chaitra śu. 15, Tuesday corresponding to 1577 A.D., April 2.

It registers a gift of income from taxes like bēḍige birāḍa etc., levied on the dēvasva lands of the deities in Guḷavāḍi of Hārū-nāḍu and those of god Kōṭiśvara of Kuḍakūru, to god Lōkanātha of Haṭṭiyaṅgaḍi for conducting regular worship according to the period, by Baṁkiyarasa alias Honneya Kaṁbaḷi-voḍeya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēnamaṁ śrīsarasvatyāyanamaṁ śrīgurubhyōṁnamaṁ nirviṣnumastu namastuṁgaṁ
śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī vijayā
dbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1499 saṁdu Upari saluva vartamāna �yośvara saṁvatsarada cayitraśuddha
15 maṁgaḷavāradallū śrīmatu haṭṭayaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara divyaśrī pādapadmaṁgaḷige baṁkiyarasarāda
hoṁneyya kaṁbaḷi voḍeyaruvoḍavaṭu koṭa sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakada dānapaṭṭiya vakhaṇeya
kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma hārunāḍasīmeya guḷavāḍiya maṁdinali dēvara dēvaśvagaḷige saluva bhūmiyamē
le kuḍukūra kōṭīśvaradēvara dēvaśvada bhūmigaḷamēlu kālakālaṁ pratiyalū naṁma Aramanege bēḍiga birā
Anayasaya Akara muṁtāda haṇahoṁnugaḷaṁnnu hiṁde kālakālaṁ pratiyalu naṁma Aramane
ge tegadukoṁḍu barutayidevāgi Ā haṇa hoṁnu yēnuṁṭādarū kuḍukura kōṭīśvaradēvara dēvastānakke
naḍava Aramaneya vartaneya haṇamaṁtādudanu sahavāgi kālakālaṁ pratiyallū naḍavaṁtā Ayana
Uccaha dhvajārōhaṇa Aṁkurārpaṇa Ava bhṛtasnāna dīpārādhane vasaṁta Uccaha muṁtādaṁtā
viniyōgada veccagaḷigāgi Ahahāṁge tathātithiya dinada sōmēpparāga puṁṇyakāladali dēvara śrīpāda
ke sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreya neradu koṭṭeU �yosaṁmaṁdada haṇa hoṁnu
yēnuṁṭādadanu hā ru nāḍanāḍu biṭṭu hasaraṇeya mēlaṇa bēḍige birāḍa yēnuṁṭṭādadanu kālaṁ
pratiyallu Āgumāḍi koḷaccayisi kālaṁpratiya Ayanada Uccahavanu Āgumāḍikoḷaccayisō
duyeṁdu koṭa sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakada sādana . dāna pālanayōrmadyē dānāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ
dānaṁ svargamavāpyōti pālanādacyataṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ . paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpahārē
ṇa svadattāṁ niśchalaṁ bhavētu . yiṁ tudakke sākṣigaḷu Ādityacaṁdrāvanilānala Uca dyaurbhūmirāpōhru
dayaṁ yamaśca Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhēca saṁdyē darṁmmasya jānāti narasyarittaṁ . baṁkkarasaru baraha .
Digital edition of SII 27.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
